target: 3. Mysterious Feeling
(First when I reunited with Ushio on the beach, and then just now during dinner...)
(Is there something wrong with me?)
(No, it's not just me that's acting weird――)
Shin-chan!
Whoa!?
S-Sorry! I didn't think you'd be that surprised.

Ah, it's fine.
I was just looking something up on my phone,
so I got startled more than usual.
What were you looking up?
Well, all sorts of things.
Anyway, didn't you need something from me?
Well, I guess you could say that... I came to tell you the bath will be open soon. You can go in next, Shin-chan.
Ah, thanks.
You must be tired from the long trip, right? You should take your time and soak. Let me know if you need anything.
Got it. I'll do just that.
(It's supposed to be my first time here in two years. And yet...)
(I feel like I was just here recently――)
Whoa!?
U-Ushio!?
Why are you walking around spaced out!? We almost crashed into each other.
We almost crashed because you were spacing out too.
Shut up! I'm allowed to be lost in thought too!
(The heat from the bath... and... the scent of shampoo...)
...W-What are you staring at!
Ah... no... You just got out of the bath.
Yeah. Got a problem with that?
No… not really…
W-why are you fidgeting!?
I-I'm not!
...J-Just so you know!
That thing on the beach was a misunderstanding! It's not like I hugged you or anything!
(You definitely hugged me!)
(...Is what I want to say, but if I make her mad, we'll just go in circles again.)
(She was just starting to get in a better mood after the curry. Let's change the subject.)
Ah, um... I guess Alain hasn't come back yet?
Yeah, seems like he's still out.
Since I made it, I want Alain to eat some curry too. I made sure to save some for him.
Honestly, I was nervous that you might eat it all.
I'm not that much of a glutton!
But Dad must be hungry from all the festival preparations...
…Ushio?
The festival preparations…
Hey, does the word 'festival' bother you?
What are you trying to say?
During dinner. The moment you heard 'festival', didn't you feel a chill?
Y-Yeah! But how did you know!?
I felt the exact same way. Look, I just said it myself and got goosebumps again.
You're right... You've got major goosebumps.
But… what's going on?
Why does it give me the chills? I should be looking forward to the festival...
Hey, Shinpei. To tell you the truth, I also thought your curry was weird.
Huh? My curry too?
Ah, no! I'm not saying it tasted bad! It was super delicious.
It's just, it's supposed to be the first time I've eaten it in two years, but it didn't feel like that at all...
Seriously?
I just can't shake the feeling that I ate it recently.
Actually... I feel the same way. I feel like I've been to Hitogashima Island and this house recently.
Even though you just came back for the first time in two years?
Hey, Ushio. Earlier at the beach, you――
You're still on about that!? That was――
Listen until the end!
You said you had a weird dream earlier at the beach, right?
I think I might have had... a dream similar to that.

Eh…?
Both of us having the same dream…
That's impossible, right?
Yeah, normally that's impossible.
But it bothered me, so I tried searching to see if a phenomenon like that exists.
And? How was it?
No good. It was just a bunch of fragmented information, so it was no help at all.
Today has just been full of things I don't understand.
In times like this, shouldn't you try thinking about it from an objective viewpoint like you always do?
No, even if I look at it objectively in this situation, I won't reach any conclusions.
Ahaha, well I guess that's true. I just thought I'd say it.
Geez...
What are you two laughing about?
Mio…!?
...Hmph.
W-What is it?

You two made up already?
That was quick.
Huh? A-Ah, well――

What!?
We haven't made up yet!
Eh…!?
Don't get ahead of yourself, Shinpei!
Hey, big sister?
I'm going to sleep! Don't come knocking in the middle of the night!
…She's gone.
Maybe I said something unnecessary?
No, don't worry about it. This kind of thing used to happen a lot, right?

Ah, yeah.
It feels nostalgic.
Shin-chan and big sister... You guys used to fight all the time.
Well, it's kind of like we've been fighting for the past two years.
But it's been a while since I've seen you two arguing face to face.
Actually, seeing you two arguing made me feel really nostalgic.
I don't know if that's something to feel nostalgic about...
But, think about it. This means...
It means you're both exactly the same as before. You guys need to grow up a bit, you know?
...Right.
Well, let me know when you're out of the bath.
A-Ah, got it.
The festival…
